# Problem

User does not like it when people around can view the portfolio value, invested amount and returns

# Solution

**Privacy Button:**

A button user can toggle to hide and how KPI values

# Design

* Button should be placed next to theme toggle button
* Button Should be an eye icon (open and close depending on the toggle mode)
* Button should be highlighted in "blue" when "on"
* Keep "button size" and styling consistent

# Implementation

* Keep changes contained,
* keep changes simple
* Keep btn implementation in @src/dashboard/src/components/button, since it is linked to the nav bar.
